exhibits.name: Financial Statements (Hyatt Hotels Corporation, audited)
exhibits.notes: Consolidated financial statements for fiscal years 2022-2024. Audited by Deloitte & Touche LLP. Includes Guarantee of Performance (p88-89), auditor report (p90-91), income statement (p92), comprehensive income (p93), balance sheet (p94), cash flows (p95-96), stockholders' equity, notes to financials.

exhibits.name: Form 8-K (SEC Filing, March 26, 2025)
exhibits.notes: Press release and forward-looking statements regarding Hyatt Hotels Corporation Q4 2024 results.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Template Franchise Agreement (2025). Includes articles I-XIX, exhibits A through H, Guaranty and Assumption, Management Company Rider, Right of First Offer (Exhibit C).

exhibits.name: State Administrators / Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state franchise administrators and registered agents.

exhibits.name: System Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: TOC for 3,334-page System Standards. Covers owner/operator communications, guest room standards, F&B, front office, housekeeping, engineering, safety/security, HR, sales/marketing, accounting, IT.

exhibits.name: Confidentiality Agreement
exhibits.notes: Must be signed before receiving any Confidential Information during evaluation.

exhibits.name: List of Current Brand Hotel Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 4 franchisees as of December 31, 2024: 2 in California (not open), 2 in Tennessee (1 open, 1 not open).

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: No franchisees left the system in the most recent fiscal year.

exhibits.name: Central Hotel Services by Hyatt Master Agreement
exhibits.notes: Governs System Services. Includes program schedules for Field Marketing, Revenue Management, Central Sales, GPGS, Digital Ancillary.

exhibits.name: Comfort Letter
exhibits.notes: Template comfort letter for lenders and ground lessors.

exhibits.name: Hosting Services Agreement
exhibits.notes: PMS hosting agreement. Includes maintenance schedule.

exhibits.name: Hyatt Franchising, L.L.C. Unaudited Balance Sheet
exhibits.notes: Franchisor unaudited balance sheet as of December 31, 2024.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Additional Disclosures and Riders
exhibits.notes: State-specific disclosures and riders to Franchise Agreement. States include Hawaii, Maryland, Michigan (see front matter), Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin, and others. Contains state effective dates page.
